seoTitle: Beard vs Bonner — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Beard and Bonner. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beard and Bonner.
heading: Beard vs Bonner — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beard, Australian Capital Territory and Bonner, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beard and Bonner have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Beard or Bonner safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beard has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Bonner scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beard scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Bonner scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beard or Bonner?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beard has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
